this_title: Superhot: The Spicy World of Pepper People
trans_title: 无辣不欢：风靡世界的辣椒
introduction: Superhot spicy peppers are on fire lately, but while most experiment with heat, others live their lives in pursuit of fire. "Superhot" is a wild ride into the Spicy World of Pepper People, the self-proclaimed chili heads who have taken the chili pill and want to find out how deep the rabbit hole goes.
chinese_title: 无辣不欢：风靡世界的辣椒
foreign_title: Superhot: The Spicy World of Pepper People
